_schema_doc: Author-curated lookup that classifies known galactic effect IDs
into the fleet vocabulary. Each fleet in HD2's war data is a PAIR
of effects on a planet: a spawn effect ('X (Enemies)') + a flag
effect ('X' base name) — the visible map marker we already render
via _paint_effect_tags. Both share the base name modulo the
'(Enemies)' suffix.
TWO effectType variants exist:
* type 40 spawn + type 71 flag — the original subfaction model
(PREDATOR / RUPTURE / DRAGONROACHES / HIVE LORDS / JET
BRIGADE / INCINERATION CORPS / CYBORGS / MINDLESS MASSES /
APPROPRIATORS / DECON DIVISION / ASSIMILATORS).
* type 41 spawn + type 41 flag — the 'rampage' subfactions
added later (PANZER DIVISION 2002+2003, STALKER RAMPAGE
2004+2005, PHANTOM WINGS 2006+2007). PLUS one flag-only
Super Earth entry: SEAF 2001 (no enemy spawn — Super Earth
units don't spawn 'against' the player).
The FleetManager (src/core/fleet_manager.py) walks
planetActiveEffects, looks each effect ID up here, and groups
effects sharing a pair_id+planet+faction into a Fleet object.
Flag-only fleets (e.g. SEAF) are tolerated by the permissive
detection pass.
ADDING NEW FLEET TYPES IS A DATA-ONLY CHANGE — no code edits.
Append a (spawn_id, flag_id) pair with a unique pair_id and the
matching faction.
Field schema:
spawn_effects[<effect_id>] = {
faction_id:      int  (1=SE, 2=Terminid, 3=Automaton, 4=Illuminate)
pair_id:         str  (binds a spawn to its matching flag)
label:           str  (human-readable label for picker UIs)
emoji:           str  (OPTIONAL Discord emoji shown for this
subfaction in the bot's Fleet dashboard, e.g.
put it on the spawn entry (or the flag entry for
flag-only subfactions). Absent/empty = no icon.)
requires_effect: int  (OPTIONAL anchor: a NEW fleet of this
subfaction can only be created on a planet that
already has this galactic effect active. Absent
or 0 = no requirement. Create-time only: after
birth the fleet moves freely along supply lines.)
flag_effects[<effect_id>] = {
faction_id:      int
pair_id:         str  (matches the spawn's pair_id; flag-only
fleets just have no matching spawn entry)
emoji:           str  (OPTIONAL; same meaning — used for flag-only
subfactions like SEAF)
requires_effect: int  (OPTIONAL; same meaning — used for
flag-only subfactions like SEAF)
